thesis: Cheap-model fan-out matches a premium single model only when the task has a cheap, reliable verifier. With a gate, best-of-N is free. Without one, agreement fails correlated.
thesis_zh: 只有当任务有一个便宜、可靠的验证器时,便宜模型 fan-out 才能追平单个高级模型。有验证门,best-of-N 是免费的;没有,共识就会相关性失效。

suites.title: Algorithms · executable gate
suites.title_zh: 算法 · 可执行验证门
suites.note: 100 graded tasks. Free reference gate — best-of-N is free.
suites.note_zh: 100 道评分任务。有免费的参考验证门 —— best-of-N 是免费的。

suites.title: Harder code · executable gate · no LLM judge
suites.title_zh: 更难的代码 · 可执行验证门 · 无 LLM 评审
suites.note: 14 harder tasks. Weak models solo pass ~11/14; the gate lifts the ensemble to level with the best premium.
suites.note_zh: 14 道更难的任务。弱模型单飞约过 11/14;验证门把整体拉到与最强高级模型持平。

suites.title: Judgment traps · no gate
suites.title_zh: 判断陷阱 · 无验证门
suites.note: 60 trap questions, strict dual-judge. No verifier — consensus fails correlated on security / impossible / subtle-correctness.
suites.note_zh: 60 道陷阱题,严格双评审。没有验证器 —— 共识在安全 / 不可能 / 细微正确性上相关性失效。

skepticHeldOut.title: Skeptic playbook · held-out generalization
skepticHeldOut.title_zh: 怀疑者手册 · 留出集泛化
skepticHeldOut.note: 20 unseen traps (playbook distilled from a different set). Category-level rules generalize.
skepticHeldOut.note_zh: 20 道未见过的陷阱(手册从另一套题蒸馏而来)。类别级规则可泛化。

sources: megabench B1/B3/B4 + held-out (2026-07); Codex independent audit reproduced the headline numbers.
sources_zh: megabench B1/B3/B4 + 留出集(2026-07);Codex 独立复核复现了头条数字。
